text: EC2 Key Facts & Features @ tisttesnsastin - © st ¢ IAAS - Provides Virtual Machines => Instances e Private service by-default - uses VPC networking * AZ Resilient - Instance fails if AZ fails ¢ Different instance sizes and capabilities ¢ On-Demand Billing - Per second ¢ Local on-host storage or Elastic Block Store (EBS)
